products.name: PARTY TIME
products.description: Ignite the night with PARTY TIME 's where every second bursts with brilliance!Get ready to elevate your celebrations with SUNS FIREWORKS' extraordinary PARTY TIME 200 Gram Cake! This spectacular firework is designed to dazzle and delight, transforming any occasion into a magical experience. Watch in awe as brocade crown tails burst into vibrant red palms and green strobes, painting the night sky with a symphony of colors for a full 20 seconds.

products.name: Gold Rush
products.description: Strike gold in the sky with Gold Rushwhere every shot is a treasure! Experience the thrill of striking gold with the SUNWING Gold Rush, featured in the Joyful Wonderland catalog! This 500G Linkable Finale Set is engineered for performance, delivering a spectacular 420 seconds plus a dazzling 24-second, 1000-gram finale that will leave your audience breathless. With an impressive 444 shots packed into each case, Gold Rush brings the brilliance and excitement of a treasure-filled sky to your celebration. Whether you're hosting a grand event or simply want to create unforgettable memories, this product is designed to inspire awe and joy for all who witness its magic. Connect multiple sets for an even larger display, and let your festivities shine brighter than ever. SUNWINGs Gold Rush is more than fireworksits your ticket to a night of wonder, celebration, and golden memories. Check out the preview video for a glimpse of the spectacular show youll deliver!
